## LogsVisualise
- **Import:** `require('../pages/dashboardPages/visualise.js')` (default export class; instantiated by PageManager as `pm.logsVisualise`)
- **Properties:**
  - `timeTab` — selector: `[data-test="date-time-btn"]` (as a Locator)
  - `relativeTime` — selector: `[data-test="date-time-relative-tab"]` (as a Locator)
  - `indexListDropdown` — selector: `[data-test="log-search-index-list-select-stream"]`
  - `functionEditor` — selector: `[data-test="logs-vrl-function-editor"]`
  - `queryEditor` — `.locator('[data-test="logs-vrl-function-editor"]').locator(".inputarea").first()`
  - `addToDashboardBtn` — selector: `[data-test="panel-editor-add-to-dashboard-btn"]`
  - `newDashboardBtn` — selector: `[data-test="dashboard-dashboard-new-add"]`
  - `dashboardNameInput` — selector: `[data-test="add-dashboard-name-field"]`
  - `dashboardSubmitBtn` — selector: `[data-test="dashboard-dashboard-add-dialog"] [data-test="o-dialog-primary-btn"]`
  - `panelTitleInput` — selector: `[data-test="metrics-new-dashboard-panel-title-field"]`
  - `updateSettingsBtn` — selector: `[data-test="add-to-dashboard-dialog"] [data-test="o-dialog-primary-btn"]`
  - `logsQueryEditor` — selector: `[data-test="logs-search-bar-query-editor"]`
- **Methods:**
  - `openLogs()` — clicks `[data-test="menu-link-\/logs-item"]`
  - `openVisualiseTab()` — clicks the Visualize toggle, waits for panel-editor-container attached; timing-aware
  - `openVisualiseTabWithVrl()` — opens Visualise tab and ensures table chart type selected
  - `logsApplyQueryButton()` — clicks logs search refresh button
  - `waitForLogsQueryToComplete(timeout=30000)` — polls run-query button state; timing-aware
  - `logsApplyQueryAndWait(timeout=30000)` — apply + wait combo
  - `setRelative(date, time)` — **clicks `timeTab` (opens picker) → clicks `relativeTime` tab → waits for and clicks `[data-test="date-time-relative-${date}-${time}-btn"]`**; timing-aware (waits for enabled state). Verified call site: `pm.logsVisualise.setRelative("30", "m")` used identically in `Dashboards/visualize.spec.js`.
  - `searchAndAddField(fieldName, target)` — adds a field to x/y/b/filter/etc via the field-list search
  - `showQueryToggle()` — clicks show-query toggle icon
  - `enableSQLMode()` — no-op (SQL mode auto-detected now)
  - `streamIndexList()` — clicks field-list-collapsed icon
  - `logsSelectStream(stream)` — selects a stream option by text match
  - `logsToggle()` — **clicks `[data-test="logs-logs-toggle"]`** (same selector as `LogsPage.clickLogsToggle()`)
  - `selectChartType(chartType)` — clicks `[data-test="selected-chart-${chartType}-item"]`
  - `removeField(alias, target)` — removes a field chip by alias/target
  - `chartRender(x, y)` — clicks chart-renderer canvas at coordinates
  - `backToLogs()` — clicks `[data-test="logs-logs-toggle"]` (alias of `logsToggle()`)
  - `openQueryEditor()` — clicks into the logs query editor code area
  - `fillQueryEditor(sqlQuery)` — fills the logs query editor Monaco input
  - `fillLogsQueryEditor(sqlQuery)` — fills `logsQueryEditor` Monaco input
  - `vrlFunctionEditor(vrl)` — clicks and fills the VRL function editor
  - `runQueryAndWaitForCompletion()` — clicks visualize refresh, waits for cancel-btn appear/disappear; timing-aware
  - `checkDashboardErrors(page, chartTypeName)` — returns dashboard error summary object
  - `verifyChartRenders(page)` — asserts chart renderer visible; timing-aware
  - `waitForChartContent(page, timeout=5000)` — polls DOM for rendered chart; timing-aware
  - `getQuickModeToggleState()` — reads aria-checked of quick-mode switch
  - `verifyQuickModeToggle(expectedState=true)` — asserts quick mode state
  - `setQuickModeToggle(enableState)` — toggles quick mode to a target state
  - `enableQuickModeIfDisabled()` / `disableQuickModeIfEnabled()` — convenience wrappers
  - `verifyChartTypeSelected(page, chartType, shouldBeSelected=true)` — asserts `data-selected` attr
  - `addPanelToNewDashboard(randomDashboardName, panelName)` — full "add to new dashboard" flow; timing-aware
  - `waitForQueryInspector(page)` / `closeQueryInspector()` — query inspector dialog helpers
  - `verifyToastMessage(expectedText, timeout=10000)` — asserts toast visible with text
  - `openPanelQueryInspector(panelName)` — opens inspector from panel dropdown; timing-aware, network-aware
  - `verifyExecutedQueryContains(expectedTexts, queryIndex=0)` — asserts inspector query text
  - `clickDashboardBackBtn()` — clicks dashboard back button
  - `getChartRendererCanvas()` / `getDashboardErrorLocator()` — locator getters
  - `verifyNoDashboardErrors()` — asserts zero dashboard-error elements
  - `getConnectNullValuesToggle()` — locator getter

## LoginPage
- **Import:** `require('../pages/generalPages/loginPage.js')` (named export `{ LoginPage }`; PageManager exposes it as `pm.loginPage` — resolves to `LoginPage` in non-cloud envs, `CloudLoginPage` when `IS_CLOUD=true`)
- **Properties:**
  - `userIdInput` — selector: `[data-test="login-user-id-field"]`
  - `passwordInput` — selector: `[data-test="login-password-field"]`
  - `loginButton` — selector: `[data-test="login-sign-in"]`
- **Methods:**
  - `gotoLoginPage()` — navigates to `process.env.ZO_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:5080"` (base URL, not `/web/login` directly — app redirects when unauthenticated); network/timing-aware
  - `loginAsInternalUser()` — clicks "Login as internal user" link if SSO form is shown (no-op in cloud); timing-aware
  - `login()` — **fills `userIdInput` with `process.env.ZO_ROOT_USER_EMAIL || "root@example.com"`, fills `passwordInput` with `process.env.ZO_ROOT_USER_PASSWORD || "Complexpass#123"`, clicks `loginButton` (retries up to 3x), waits for `/auth/login` 200 response, waits for URL match `/\/web\//`**. Exact same credential defaults as the raw generated test. Cloud branch instead navigates directly using saved storageState. Verified real call site: `pm.loginPage.gotoLoginPage(); pm.loginPage.loginAsInternalUser(); pm.loginPage.login();` in `Logs/pagination.spec.js` and other specs.
  - `gotoLoginPageSC()` / `loginAsInternalUserSC()` / `loginSC()` — Super-Cluster (SC) UI variants of the above, targeting `ZO_BASE_URL_SC_UI`

## isCloudEnvironment (cloud-env.js)
- **Import:** `require('../pages/cloudPages/cloud-env.js')` (named export `{ isCloudEnvironment }`)
- **Properties:** none (single utility function module)
- **Methods:**
  - `isCloudEnvironment()` — returns `process.env.IS_CLOUD === 'true'`; used by `PageManager` to pick `LoginPage` vs `CloudLoginPage`, and by several page objects (e.g. `TracesPage.navigateToTraces()`) for cloud-specific branching

## TracesPage
- **Import:** `require('../pages/tracesPages/tracesPage.js')` (named export `{ TracesPage }`; PageManager exposes it as `pm.tracesPage`)
- **Properties (selected, file is ~2400 lines):**
  - `tracesMenuItem` — `[data-test="menu-link-\/traces-item"]`
  - `searchToggle` / `spansToggle` / `serviceMapsToggle` / `servicesCatalogToggle` — search-mode toggle buttons
  - `dateTimeButton` — imported constant `dateTimeButtonLocator` = `[data-test="date-time-btn"]` (from `commonActions.js`)
  - `relative30SecondsButton` — Locator for imported constant `relative30SecondsButtonLocator` = `[data-test="date-time-relative-30-s-btn"]`
  - `absoluteTab` — imported constant `absoluteTabLocator` = `[data-test="date-time-absolute-tab"]`
  - `refreshButton` — `[data-test="logs-search-bar-refresh-btn"]`
  - `searchResultItem` — `[data-test^="o2-table-detail-"]`
  - `streamSelect` — `[data-test="log-search-index-list-select-stream"]`
  - `queryEditor` — `[data-test="query-editor"]`
  - (~50 more selectors for trace-details, service graph, analysis dashboard, field list — see file for full list)
- **Methods (selected, ~85 total):**
  - `navigateToTraces()` — clicks traces menu item; cloud-aware URL fallback
  - `setTimeToPast30Seconds()` — clicks `dateTimeButton` then `relative30SecondsButton`
  - `setTimeRange(range)` — clicks `dateTimeButton`, maps `range` string (e.g. `'30m'`) to `[data-test="date-time-relative-30-m-btn"]` and clicks it; **structurally similar to the raw test's relative-30m click, but scoped to Traces page — not used since this test operates on the Logs page**
  - `verifyTimeSetTo30Seconds()` — asserts `dateTimeButton` contains imported `Past30SecondsValue` = `'Past 30 Seconds'`
  - `runTraceSearch()` / `runSearch()` — click refresh and wait for terminal state; timing-aware
  - `selectTraceStream(streamName)` — opens stream OSelect popover and picks option; timing-aware
  - `switchToSQLMode()` / `enterSQLQuery(query)` / `runQuery()` — Monaco-based SQL query helpers
  - `expectSearchResultsVisible()` / `expectNoResultsMessage()` / `expectTraceDetailsVisible()` — assertion helpers
  - `signOut()` — clicks profile button then sign-out
  - many more `is*Visible()` / `expect*()` / `click*()` helpers for trace details, service graph, and analysis-dashboard sidebar (see source for full ~85-method list)

## AlertCreationWizard
- **Import:** `require('../pages/alertsPages/alertCreationWizard.js')` (named export `{ AlertCreationWizard }`; constructed as `new AlertCreationWizard(page, commonActions, locators)`, not directly exposed on `PageManager` — `pm.alertsPage` wraps related alert flows instead)
- **Properties:** `page`, `commonActions`, `locators` (locator map is injected by the caller), `currentAlertName`
- **Methods:**
  - `selectStreamByName(streamName)` — keyboard-filters and selects a stream in the wizard's stream dropdown, with retry-and-reopen fallback; timing-aware
  - `createAlert(streamName, column, value, destinationName, randomValue)` — full real-time alert wizard flow (setup → condition → destination → submit); network/timing-aware
  - `createAlertWithDefaults(streamName, destinationName, randomValue)` — same flow using first-available column/destination fallbacks
  - `createScheduledAlertWithSQL(streamName, destinationName, randomValue)` — scheduled-alert flow with SQL tab + Monaco editor + threshold config
  - `createAlertWithMultipleConditions(streamName, destinationName, randomValue)` — real-time alert with two AND-joined conditions
  - `createScheduledAlertWithDeduplication(streamName, destinationName, randomValue, dedupConfig)` — scheduled alert + Advanced-tab dedup config
  - `testConditionOperatorToggle(streamName, randomValue)` — attempts AND→OR toggle via 3 fallback strategies, returns `{toggleSuccessful, message}`
  - `addConditionGroup()` / `toggleConditionOperator()` / `deleteCondition(index=0)` — condition-list management helpers
  - (a few further deduplication-step helper methods follow in the file)

## LogsPage
- **Import:** `require('../pages/logsPages/logsPage.js')` (named export `{ LogsPage }`; PageManager exposes it as `pm.logsPage`)
- **NOTE:** this file is exceptionally large (10,628 lines / ~180 constructor properties / 708 async methods) — a full per-method description is impractical. Below is the complete constructor property list plus full method-name index for discoverability; only the methods actually relevant to this test carry a full description.
- **Directly relevant (full description):**
  - `dateTimeButton` (property) — selector: `[data-test="date-time-btn"]`
  - `logsToggle` (property) — selector: `[data-test="logs-logs-toggle"]`
  - `relative15MinButton` / `relative6WeeksButton` / `relative30SecondsButton` / `relative1HourButton` (properties) — fixed relative-range selectors (no generic `${date}-${time}` builder in this file — see `LogsVisualise.setRelative()` for that)
  - `clickDateTimeButton()` — waits for `[data-test="date-time-btn"]` visible then `.click({force:true})` (method redefined twice in file; both target the same selector)
  - `clickRelative15MinButton()` / `clickRelative6WeeksButton()` — click the corresponding fixed relative-range button
  - `getDateTimeButton()` — **returns `page.locator('[data-test="date-time-btn"]').first()`** — reusable Locator getter, used for hover/assert in this test
  - `clickLogsToggle()` — **clicks `this.logsToggle` (`[data-test="logs-logs-toggle"]`), then waits 500ms**; verified real call site: `pm.logsPage.clickLogsToggle()` in `Logs/logsQueryBuilder-chart.spec.js`

    - `logsMenuItem` — '[data-test="menu-link-\\/logs-item"]'

## MetricsPage
- **Import:** `require('../pages/metricsPages/metricsPage.js')` (named export `{ MetricsPage }`; PageManager exposes it as `pm.metricsPage`)
- **Properties:** ~64 constructor properties (metrics stream select, query editor, chart type items, date picker, etc. — not read at depth given no raw action in this test maps to Metrics)
- **Methods (signatures only, 255 total, selected names):** `gotoMetricsPage()`, `metricsPageValidation()`, `openDatePicker()`, `selectTimeRange(range)`, `setCustomTimeRange(from, to)`, `selectMetricsStream(streamName)`, `selectMetricFromList(metricName)`, `enterMetricsQuery(query)`, `switchToSQLMode()`, `switchToPromQLMode()`, `executeQuery(query)`, `selectChartType(chartType)`, `zoomChart(zoomLevel)`, `exportChart(format)` — plus ~240 further `is*/get*/expect*/click*` helpers.

## CommonActions
- **Import:** `require('../pages/commonActions.js')` (named export `{ CommonActions }`, plus module-level named exports `openNavFlyoutChild`, `dateTimeButtonLocator`, `relative30SecondsButtonLocator`, `absoluteTabLocator`, `Past30SecondsValue`, `startTimeValue`, `endTimeValue`, `startDateTimeValue`, `endDateTimeValue`; PageManager exposes the class as `pm.commonActions`)
- **Properties:** `alertsMenuItem`, `settingsMenuItem`, `homeMenuItem` (nav locators)
- **Methods:** `navigateToAlerts()`, `navigateToSettings()`, `navigateToHome()`, `scrollAndFindOption(optionName, optionType)`, `ingestTestData(streamName)`, `ingestTestDataWithUniqueId(...)`, `initializeAlertTestStream(streamName)`, `ingestCustomTestData(streamName)`, `skipDataIngestionForScheduledAlert(testTitle, streamName)`, `dismissBlockingOverlays()`, `getStreamingState()`, `flipStreaming()`, `queryStream(streamName, searchQuery, timeRangeMinutes)`, `waitForAlertInValidationStream(...)`, `countAlertNotificationsInStream(...)`, `waitForExactNotificationCount(...)`, `generateBasicAuthHeader(username, password)` (static), `getElementsWithText(text)`, `getPageTitle()`, `getQueryManagementMenuItem()`.
- Also exports module-level function `openNavFlyoutChild(page, child)` — hovers a left-nav group tile and clicks a flyout child by logical key.

## LogsQueryPage
- **Import:** `require('../pages/logsPages/logsQueryPage.js')` (named export `{ LogsQueryPage }`; PageManager exposes it as `pm.logsQueryPage`; also internally composed inside `LogsPage` as `this.logsQueryPage`)
- **Properties:** `queryEditor`, `dateTimeButton` (`[data-test="date-time-btn"]`), `relative15MinButton` (`[data-test="date-time-relative-15-m-btn"]`), `refreshButton`, `errorMessage`, `utilitiesMenuButton`, `resetFiltersButton`, `resultDetail`, `histogramToggle` (+checked/unchecked variants), `sqlModeToggle` (+checked/unchecked variants), `autoRunDropdownBtn`, `autoRunToggleItem`
- **Methods:** `setDateTimeFilter()`, `typeQuery(query)`, `clickRefresh()`, `clickErrorMessage()`, `clickResetFilters()`, `clickNoDataFound()`, `clickResultDetail()`, `waitForTimeout(milliseconds)`, `toggleHistogram()`, `isHistogramOn()`, `ensureHistogramState(desiredState)`, `isSQLModeOn()`, `ensureSQLMode()`, `ensureFTSMode()`, `disableAutoRun()`, `enableAutoRun()` (+ private `_openUtilitiesMenuForSqlMode()`, `_isAutoQueryEnabled()`, `_toggleAutoRun()`)
